mapper.sql: m.id, m.dept_id, m.major_name, m.major_code, m.edu_level, m.study_year, m.sort, m.status, m.create_time, m.update_time, d.dept_name as college_name
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_major m LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON m.dept_id = d.id WHERE m.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_major (dept_id, major_name, major_code, edu_level, study_year, sort, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{deptId}, #{majorName}, #{majorCode}, #{eduLevel}, #{studyYear}, #{sort}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM edu_major WHERE id IN #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_major m LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON m.dept_id = d.id WHERE m.major_code = #{majorCode} LIMIT 1
